title: A Resolution Approving the Barangay Annual Budget of Barangay Tuntungin-putho, Los Baños, Laguna for the Year 2022 in the Amount of Twelve Million Four Hundred Sixteen Thousand Two Hundred Forty One Pesos and 00/100 Only (P 12,416,241.00). (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR JONATHAN BRYAN S. SIYTIAP, 7/25/2022)
